title: BASiCS workflow: a step-by-step analysis of expression variability using single cell RNA sequencing data
author: O'Callaghan, Alan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Files used in the generation of the manuscript "BASiCS workflow: a step-by-step analysis of expression variability using single cell RNA sequencing data". These files are MCMC chains generated using BASiCS, gene annotations, and scripts used to generate these files, as well as supplementary methods and analysis.
steps_raw: Files used in the generation of the manuscript "BASiCS workflow: a step-by-step analysis of expression variability using single cell RNA sequencing data". These files are MCMC chains generated using BASiCS, gene annotations, and scripts used to generate these files, as well as supplementary methods and analysis.
